positive: A vibrant, hyper-detailed watercolor illustration of a bioluminescent forest at twilight. Giant glowing mushrooms, ethereal fireflies, and winding mossy paths are illuminated by soft, mystical light. Studio Ghibli aesthetic, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, fantasy concept art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, oversaturated, harsh shadows
